title: Prompt-Literate Workflow
description: Prompt-Literate Workflow is a structured method for using LLMs inside a literate workflow. It is not a prompt-to-code shortcut: it organizes work through a human-authored plan, chunk contracts, bounded prompts, candidate output, review, tests or smoke-checks, and TRACE. The repository uses scoped multi-licensing: methodological prose and documentation are licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-SA 4.0); reusable schemas, starter files, prompts, examples, scripts, and tests are licensed under the MIT License. See LICENSE.md and LICENSING-OVERRIDES.md for the authoritative licensing map.
